overall.description: A cinematic game-engine rendered scene of ocean waves crashing on a reddish shore during golden hour. The camera sits at water level as rhythmic waves roll in and out, with distant mountains and a sailboat visible on the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a tranquil coastal scene at golden hour, with the camera positioned at water level. Rhythmic waves crash onto the reddish shore while the sun creates a brilliant golden path across the water. A distant white sailboat sits on the horizon beneath a partly cloudy sky.

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, a sailboat with distinctive red sails becomes prominently visible on the right horizon, replacing the earlier white sail. The coastal rocks remain visible on the right as waves continue their relentless crash onto the reddish shore, maintaining the golden hour atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a reddish shoreline that shifts its focus from a wide, tranquil horizon to a more detailed coastal perspective. It begins at water level, capturing rhythmic waves crashing onto the shore while a brilliant golden path of sunlight stretches toward a distant white sailboat. As the camera pans slightly to the right, dark coastal rocks emerge along the shoreline, bringing the sailboat more centrally into the frame. The scene then shifts its focus further toward the horizon, where the white sail is replaced by a sailboat with distinctive red sails. Finally, the camera lingers on this new vessel against the golden hour sky as the waves continue their relentless crash against the red sands and dark rocks.
